data.content: Shipment complete. Fast-forwarded main from 28cedb557f444696776b2b7ea78826f0179fc0ca to 32bc14ed41391936403389f909e2dbdbc9fb3226 and pushed HEAD:main to origin/main. Local merge printed the known sync warning about 1 active lease during post-merge sync, but git merge and push both succeeded. Remote checks for commit 32bc14ed41391936403389f909e2dbdbc9fb3226 are green: CI 25309616871 success and Coverage Badge 25309616867 success; CI emitted non-failing coverage regression annotations.
